# Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

Thank you for your interest in contributing to the Rinthy Website!

By signing this CLA, you agree to the following terms:

## Agreement

"I hereby grant to the project maintainers and contributors a perpetual, irrevocable, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, copy, modify, and distribute any contributions I make to this project."

## Terms

1. **Original Work**: I confirm that my contributions are original work or I have the right to submit them.

2. **Copyright Assignment**: I assign copyright of my contributions to the project maintainers.

3. **No Legal Actions**: I agree not to bring any legal actions regarding my contributions after signing this CLA.

4. **MIT License**: All contributions will be licensed under the MIT License.

## How to Sign

To sign this CLA, simply comment "I agree to sign the CLA" on this pull request.

This project is based on the Rinthy project by imsawiq.
